arts.sum: Pau Torres was occupied by Joao Pedro, and with Diego Carlos caught up the pitch, Adingra picked up the pieces in the box and beat Emi Martinez. Aston Villa's three-match winning run at home came to an end after being held to a 2-2 draw with Brighton.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery takes unorthodox view on VAR after Aston Villa controversy
arts.sum: Aston Villa were penalised on Boxing Day when striker Jhon Duran was sent off against Newcastle after VAR intervened - but head coach Unai Emery says he is in favour of the technology if used correctly

arts.ttl: Brentford and Brighton dealt blow in possible January move – Club’s decision communicated to agent
arts.sum: Over the last few months, Brentford and Brighton & Hove Albion have been linked with a move for Genoa midfielder Morten Frendrup. Earlier this month, it was suggested that the player was close to joining Brentford in the summer but the move never materialised. Previous reports said Brighton were an interested party for the player.
